meta_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity project template to Solve can't debug code (Beginner Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome can't debug code. A Beginner-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Antigravity Project Template: Solve Debugging Issues Fast
content.seo_description: Master the Antigravity project template to eliminate debugging roadblocks. A high-efficiency guide for freelancers using Claude Code to ship faster.
content.answer_block: Stop wasting hours manually tracing bugs. By leveraging the Antigravity project template, you establish a standardized, AI-ready architectural foundation. Combined with Claude Code's autonomous reasoning, you can automatically identify, isolate, and patch errors, turning complex debugging sessions into automated, repeatable workflows that save your clients time and money.
content.intro:
You’re staring at a terminal full of cryptic stack traces, the clock is ticking on a client deliverable, and the mental friction of debugging is killing your flow. Every minute spent chasing a ghost in the codebase is a minute you aren't shipping. It's the silent killer of freelance profit margins.

But the best in the business don't debug manually—they architect for resilience. By adopting the Antigravity project template, you move away from chaotic, spaghetti-code structures and into a deterministic, AI-friendly environment. This is how you reclaim your time, maintain your sanity, and deliver bulletproof software that makes clients wonder how you move so fast.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Template
steps.description: Establish the standardized structure that allows AI agents to map your codebase instantly.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a new project structure using the Antigravity boilerplate. Ensure strict separation of concerns between services, models, and UI components.

steps.title: Configure the Context Awareness Layer
steps.description: Define the project boundaries to ensure Claude Code focuses only on relevant code segments.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create an .ag-context file that identifies core business logic directories and excludes auto-generated build files.

steps.title: Automate Error Trace Injection
steps.description: Use the template's built-in logging to provide high-fidelity data for the AI to debug.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Integrate structured error logging across all API endpoints that pipes directly into the /logs directory for AI analysis.

steps.title: Execute Autonomous Debug Cycle
steps.description: Trigger the AI to analyze the trace and propose a surgical fix.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the latest log trace in /logs/error.log. Identify the root cause in the service layer and generate a fix that follows the existing pattern.

steps.title: Validate with Regression Testing
steps.description: Ensure the fix doesn't break existing functionality before deploying.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Run the test suite and verify that the fix addresses the bug without introducing regressions in the auth module.

pro_tips: Always keep your 'ag-ignore' file updated to prevent the AI from trying to refactor third-party node_modules.
Use 'claude-code' in --dry-run mode first to review AI-generated patches before applying them to production code.
Structure your project with a 'contracts' folder to keep interfaces clean, which significantly boosts AI reasoning accuracy.
Batch your debugging sessions: collect 3-5 errors before running a full AI analysis to save on context window costs.
Use custom 'agent-instructions.md' files within the template to enforce your specific coding style across all AI-generated fixes.
content.next_steps: After mastering the debugging workflow, implement a CI/CD pipeline using the Antigravity template to automate deployment every time Claude Code confirms a successful test pass.
content.conversion_block: Stop fighting your code and start commanding it. With the right template and the right agent, you become a 10x developer by default. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
